activity_1_b.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වචන නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_1_d.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_1_e.text:
Read along.
පිටපත සමඟ කියවන්න.
ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

content.sentence_text: The technician was able to adjust the 'th'rottle accurately during the test run.
We were able to monitor 'th'ermal behaviour throughout the operating cycle.
The team could trace the airflow pa'th'way after completing the inspection.
The inspector could measure the groove dep'th' without dismantling the unit.

example.text:
Listen to the model dialogues.
ආදර්ශ සංවාදවලට සවන් දෙන්න.
மாதிரி உரையாடல்களை கேளுங்கள்.

activity_2_a.text:
Match the words with the pictures.
පින්තූර සමඟ වචන ගලපන්න.
சொற்களைப் படங்களுடன் பொருத்துங்கள்.

activity_2_c.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.

activity_2_e.text:
Listen and speak the missing line during the pause and check your answer.
සංවාදයට සවන් දෙන්න, විරාමයක් පවතින විට අඩුව පවතින වාක්‍යය පවසන්න, ඉන්පසු ඔබේ පිළිතුර පරීක්ෂා කර බලන්න.
ஒலிப்பதிவைக் கவனிக்கவும், இடைவேளையின் போது விடுபட்ட வசனத்தைச் சொல்லவும், பின்னர் உங்கள் பதிலைச் சரிபார்க்கவும்.

example_dialogues.text_a: Was Ravi able to lift the principal’s desk this morning?
example_dialogues.text_b: No, he wasn’t able to. It was too heavy.

example_dialogues.text_a: Were the trainees able to eat the food at the canteen this afternoon?
example_dialogues.text_b: No, they weren’t able to. It was too spicy.

example_dialogues.text_a: Was the instructor able to find the warranty cards for the new printers last night?
example_dialogues.text_b: No, he wasn’t able to. It was too dark.

keywords.word: give a presentation in the welding workshop
sit down on the school bus
see the registrar in the office
solve the ignition problem with the industrial oven

dialogues.text_a: Was Meena able to finish the maintenance report this afternoon?
dialogues.text_b: No, she wasn’t able to. It was too complicated.

dialogues.text_a: Were the trainees able to give a presentation in the welding workshop this morning?
dialogues.text_b: No, they weren’t able to. It was too noisy.

dialogues.text_a: Was the supervisor able to inspect the distribution board yesterday?
dialogues.text_b: No, he wasn’t able to. It was too risky.

dialogues.text_a: Were Mary and Anisha able to sit down on the school bus this morning?
dialogues.text_b: No, they weren’t able to. It was too crowded.

dialogues.text_a: Were your parents able to see the registrar in the office yesterday morning?
dialogues.text_b: No, they weren’t able to. She was too busy.

dialogues.text_a: Was the instructor able to solve the ignition problem with the industrial oven last week?
dialogues.text_b: No, he wasn’t able to. It was too difficult.

activity_a.text:
Choose the most appropriate response.
 වඩාත්ම සුදුසු ප්‍රතිචාරය තෝරන්න.
 மிகவும் பொருத்தமான பதிலைத் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கவும்.

activity_b.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

content.sentence: Are you able to work under pressure during busy periods?
options: No, I am. I need more time to adjust.
Yes, I am. I stay calm and organised.
Yes, I will. I can manage tasks efficiently.
content.answer: Yes, I am. I stay calm and organised.

content.sentence: Will you be able to travel if the company requires it?
options: Yes, I am. I am flexible with my schedule.
No, I will. I have personal commitments at home.
Yes, I will. I am willing to travel whenever necessary.
content.answer: Yes, I will. I am willing to travel whenever necessary.

content.sentence: Were you able to meet deadlines in your previous job?
options: Yes, I am. I always try to stay organised.
Yes, I was. I consistently completed my tasks on time.
Yes, I were. I worked hard to finish all projects.
content.answer: Yes, I was. I consistently completed my tasks on time.

content.sentence: Would you be able to manage a small team if needed?
options: No, I would. I prefer to work independently.
Yes, I would. I can lead a team effectively.
Yes, I was. I supported my colleagues when necessary.
content.answer: Yes, I would. I can lead a team effectively.

content.sentence: Are you able to operate technical equipment safely?
options: Yes, I am. I always follow safety procedures carefully.
Yes, I was. I worked safely in my previous role.
Yes, I will. I plan to follow all safety guidelines.
content.answer: Yes, I am. I always follow safety procedures carefully.

content.sentence: When will you be able to start?
options: Not sure, maybe this week, maybe next month.
In two weeks, as I am obliged to give two weeks’ notice in my current job.
Tomorrow. My current boss is not nice so I can start immediately.
content.answer: In two weeks, as I am obliged to give two weeks’ notice in my current job.

content.sentence: Were you able to solve problems independently in your last role?
options: Yes, I will. I am confident about future challenges.
Yes, I am. I handle issues calmly and logically.
Yes, I was. I often resolved technical issues on my own.
content.answer: Yes, I was. I often resolved technical issues on my own.

content.sentence: Would you be able to work overtime during peak seasons?
options: Yes, I was. I worked extra hours in my previous job.
Yes, I would. I understand that peak seasons require flexibility.
Yes, I am. I manage my time carefully.
content.answer: Yes, I would. I understand that peak seasons require flexibility.

content.sentence: Are you able to communicate clearly with clients?
options: Yes, I will. I will improve my communication skills.
Yes, I am. I speak clearly and listen carefully.
Yes, I was. I communicated well in my previous job.
content.answer: Yes, I am. I speak clearly and listen carefully.

content.sentence: Are you able to solve technical problems independently?
options: Yes, I will. I will work independently in the future.
Yes, I am. I work independently and efficiently.
Yes, I was. I solved problems independently in my previous job.
content.answer: Yes, I am. I work independently and efficiently.

Yes, I am. I work independently and efficiently.

activity_a.text:
Listen to the audio which will be played twice and click on the correct answer. It is very important that you read the questions before you listen to the recording.
ඔබට සෑම පටිගත කිරීමක්ම දෙවරක් ඇසෙනු ඇත. නිවැරදි පිළිතුර ක්ලික් කරන්න. රෙකෝඩින් එක අහන්නට පෙර ප්‍රශ්නය කියවීම ඉතාමත් වැදගත්ය.
ஒவ்வொரு ஒலிப்பதிவையும் நீங்கள் இருமுறை கேட்கலாம். கேட்ட எண்களை குறித்து எழுதுங்கள். பதிவைக் கேட்பதற்கு முன் கேள்விகளைப் படிப்பது மிகவும் முக்கியம்.

activity_b.text:
Listen.
கேளுங்கள்.
සවන් දෙන්න.

activity_c.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

activity_d.text: Read along. පිටපත සමඟ කියවන්න. ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

Questions.question: Why is it important for a trainee technician to use diagnostic tools carefully?
Questions.answer: To find vehicle faults correctly and quickly.
options: To finish work faster than senior technicians.
To find vehicle faults correctly and quickly.
To avoid talking with customers.

Questions.question: What does a good response to workplace pressure usually include?
Questions.answer: Staying calm and communicating clearly with the team.
options: Working alone without asking questions.
Communicating clearly with the team about their mistakes.
Staying calm and communicating clearly with the team.

Questions.question: Which actions show good safety practice in a workshop?
Questions.answer: Wearing protective equipment, calibrating tools, and keeping the work area clean.
options: Wearing protective equipment, cleaning tools, and keeping power on.
Wearing protective equipment, calibrating tools, and keeping the work area clean.
Wearing some protective equipment and keeping all tools close.

Questions.question: Why may a technician need more training after basic certification?
Questions.answer: Modern vehicles use new systems that need updated knowledge.
options: Modern vehicle designs do not change much.
Experience replaces the need for learning.
Modern vehicles use new systems that need updated knowledge.

Questions.question: What does a positive learning attitude in a workshop show?
Questions.answer: The technician accepts guidance and improves skills over time.
options: The technician avoids difficult tasks.
The technician accepts guidance and improves skills over time.
The technician works only on familiar jobs.

activity_b.text: I assisted senior mechanics with oil and filter changes, brake checks, clutch adjustments, and battery testing.
I also helped with tyre replacement, wheel alignment checks, and simple engine diagnostics using scan tools.
I always follow safety rules carefully.
I wear protective equipment, isolate electrical systems before repairs, and use jack stands correctly.
I also ensure that tools are calibrated and the work area is kept clean to prevent accidents.
I can use basic diagnostic scanners and read fault codes.
I understand the role of electronic systems and sensors in finding faults accurately and quickly.
I am still learning advanced diagnostics, but I am willing to improve and learn new vehicle technologies.
I try to stay calm and communicate clearly with my team.
I believe good teamwork helps us work efficiently and maintain quality.
I need more practice with complex engine repairs, timing belt replacement, and fuel system work.
However, I am keen to learn new skills and ask for guidance when needed.

instrction_a.text:
Watch this video to help you better understand today’s lesson.
අද පාඩම හොඳින් අවබෝධ කර ගැනීමට මෙම වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
இன்றைய பாடத்தை நன்றாக புரிந்துகொள்ள இந்த வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.

instruction_b.text:
These steps will help you to learn English from this video.
මෙම වීඩියෝවෙන් ඉංග්‍රීසි ඉගෙන ගැනීමට මෙම පියවර ඔබට උපකාරී වනු ඇත.
இந்த வீடியோவிலிருந்து ஆங்கிலம் கற்க இந்த படிகள் உங்களுக்கு உதவும்.
steps:
Watch the video 2 times.
මේ වීඩියෝ එක දෙවරක් බලන්න.
வீடியோவை இரண்டு முறைப் பாருங்கள்.

Learn new words using Google Translate.
Google පරිවර්තකය භාවිතයෙන් නව වචන ඉගෙන ගන්න.
கூகுள் ட்ரான்ஸ்லேட் பயன்படுத்தி புதிய சொற்களைக் கற்றுக்கொள்ளுங்கள்.
